Product Guide: Sentinel TriBridComponent ID: F-SEC-001Classification: Security ArchitectureAuthor: Security Lead1. Vision & PurposeSentinel TriBrid is the unified security layer. It replaces the fragmented safety checks of Rust (Static vs Runtime) with a three-pillar system that covers the entire lifecycle of a program.2. The Three PillarsStatic Sentinel (Formal): Proves the absence of deadlocks and race conditions in Flux channels during compilation.Runtime Sentinel (Hardware): Uses Intel PT/ARM CoreSight to monitor the CPU's instruction pointer, preventing any execution outside the valid Control Flow Graph.Audit Sentinel (Supply Chain): Cryptographically verifies every dependency and blocks any unverified unsafe code.3. Technical SpecsOverhead: <0.5% (Hardware-assisted).Target: Zero-Day exploit prevention and supply-chain integrity.4. Why this existsBecause "Memory Safety" is not enough. We need "Execution Safety" and "Provenance Safety" to run in high-stakes environments.
